acceptance_criteria: Required checks pass for the exact merge candidate in a clean environment
Protected-branch policy is verified before the merge proceeds
summary: Clean-environment CI gate and protected-branch policy checks before merge

acceptance_criteria: Authoritative checks run against the merged commit and record evidence
A failure stops further shipping and produces a human-reviewed Recovery Proposal
summary: Post-Merge Verification against the resulting target-branch commit, with human-reviewed Recovery Proposals on failure

acceptance_criteria: A deployment adapter ships an approved, post-merge-verified revision behind the adapter boundary
Deployment changes no workflow state semantics or approval authority
summary: Deployment adapters after merge safety is demonstrated
